title: Read, Unread, Star, Tag, Bulk Action, and Conflict Semantics · Changed-Input Lab
summary: An independent community archive receives a different publisher mix, malformed feed, validator state, tenant, schedule, database condition, accessibility need, platform, and injected failure and transfers read, unread, star, tag, bulk action, and conflict semantics into a changed consistent personal reader-state model. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of consistent personal reader-state model with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through predict…
objectives: Keep read, unread, starred, hidden, saved, and tag relationships scoped to principal, tenant, and entry without mutating shared content.
Make set-state commands idempotent with explicit desired state, preconditions where needed, and stable response semantics.
Define bounded all-or-nothing or per-item bulk semantics, authorization, result reconciliation, and retry behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Feed Go Personal State Ownership
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go team handles case 8292 during a publisher-fairness incident rehearsal. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove private reader state, desired-state commands, bulk semantics, conflicts, and count repair; every goroutine, body, row set, transaction, lease, timer, and pool needs named cleanup ownership; then change one schema, constraint, transaction, upsert, migration, query, or search plan and preserve admitted state. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Keep read, unread, starred, hidden, saved, and tag relationships scoped to principal, tenant, and entry without mutating shared content.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Feed Go Personal State Ownership.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for keep read, unread, starred, hidden, saved, and tag relationships scoped to principal, tenant, and entry without mutating shared content. For Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Feed Go Personal State Ownership, keep Feed Go Personal State Ownership connected to executable Go feed, XML, HTTP, PostgreSQL, schedule, API, reader, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
